heading: Administration, protection, and development
label: 450oo–9 Administration, protection, and development
text: When establishment of the monument has been effected, pursuant to sections 450 to 450–10 of this title, the Secretary of the Interior shall administer, protect, and develop the monument in accordance with the provisions of the Act entitled “An Act to establish a National Park Service, and for other purposes” approved (), as amended.ooooAugust 25, 191639 Stat. 5351See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThe Act entitled “An Act to establish a National Park Service, and for other purposes” approved (), referred to in text, is , , known as the National Park Service Organic Act, which enacted sections 1, 2, 3, and 4 of this title and provisions set out as a note under , National Park Service and Related Programs. Sections 1 to 4 of the Act were repealed and restated as , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, and section 100101(a), chapter 1003, and sections 100751(a), 100752, 100753, and 102101 of Title 54 by , §§ 3, 4(a)(1), 7, , , 3260, 3272. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.
